'''ngadazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wycheproofite|wycheproofite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wycheproofite|wycheproofite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngadazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngædæzhæth|ngædæzhæth]] || [[word:ngædæzhæj|ngædæzhæj]] || [[word:ngædæzhæsh|ngædæzhæsh]] || [[word:ngædæzhæ|ngædæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadadazhath|ngadadazhath]] || [[word:ngadadazhaj|ngadadazhaj]] || [[word:ngadadazhash|ngadadazhash]] || [[word:ngadadazha|ngadadazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadazhath|ngadazhath]] || [[word:ngadazhaj|ngadazhaj]] || [[word:ngadazhash|ngadazhash]] || [[word:ngadazha|ngadazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadafzhath|ngadafzhath]] || [[word:ngadafzhaj|ngadafzhaj]] || [[word:ngadafzhash|ngadafzhash]] || [[word:ngadafzhaf|ngadafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngadazhatha|ngadazhatha]] || [[word:ngadazhaja|ngadazhaja]] || [[word:ngadazhasha|ngadazhasha]] || [[word:ngadazhaka|ngadazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngadazhath|ngadazhath]] || [[word:ngadazhaj|ngadazhaj]] || [[word:ngadazhash|ngadazhash]] || [[word:ngadazha|ngadazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngadazhathal|ngadazhathal]] || [[word:ngadazhajal|ngadazhajal]] || [[word:ngadazhashal|ngadazhashal]] || [[word:ngadazhakal|ngadazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngadazhathatha|ngadazhathatha]] || [[word:ngadazhajaja|ngadazhajaja]] || [[word:ngadazhashasha|ngadazhashasha]] || [[word:ngadazhaka|ngadazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngadazhathan|ngadazhathan]] || [[word:ngadazhajan|ngadazhajan]] || [[word:ngadazhashan|ngadazhashan]] || [[word:ngadazhakan|ngadazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngadazhathaoro|ngadazhathaoro]] || [[word:ngadazhajaoro|ngadazhajaoro]] || [[word:ngadazhashaoro|ngadazhashaoro]] || [[word:ngadazhakaoro|ngadazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
